category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Colombia) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Colombia Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入哥伦比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入哥倫比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Colombia requirements: ONAC-recognized certification under RETIE and RETILAP, RETIQ labelling, NTC/IEC 62133 cell-safety alignment, CRC/ANE radio and EMC handling, UN 38.3 transport, and importer-led market access via SIC and key ports such as Cartagena and Buenaventura.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源文件与哥伦比亚要求对照：通过ONAC认可机构进行的 RETIE 与 RETILAP 合规、RETIQ 标识、ICONTEC NTC 采标（IEC 62133）电芯安全对齐、CRC/ANE 无线无线电与 EMC 要求、UN 38.3 运输，以及由进口商负责、由SIC执行监管并通过卡塔赫纳和布埃纳文图拉等口岸入境的市场准入路径。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源文件與哥倫比亞要求對照：透過 ONAC 認可機構進行的 RETIE 與 RETILAP 合規、RETIQ 標示、ICONTEC NTC 對應（IEC 62133）電芯安全一致性、CRC/ANE 無線電與 EMC 要求、UN 38.3 運輸，以及由進口商負責、由 SIC 監管並透過卡塔赫納與布埃納文圖拉等港口入境的市場准入路徑。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Colombia requires on-target evidence tied to RETIE, RETILAP, RETIQ and SIC oversight. For lithium batteries and power banks, the key gap versus China is not only test content but also market architecture: ONAC route certification, importer responsibility, UN 38.3 transport, and entry-document alignment. Colombia has no EU-style horizontal battery regulation, RoHS-style general restriction chapter, or EU-like outdoor-noise framework.
answer_first.zh: 哥伦比亚对中国锂电池及移动电源采用 RETIE、RETILAP、RETIQ 与 SIC监管的目标市场证据体系。差距不在于测试结果本身，而在于市场架构：通过ONAC路径认证、在地进口商责任、UN 38.3运输与入境文件衔接。哥伦比亚不存在欧盟式统一的电池法规、RoHS一体化禁限用体系或欧盟意义上的户外噪声统一框架。
answer_first.zht: 哥倫比亞對中國鋰電池及行動電源採用 RETIE、RETILAP、RETIQ 與 SIC 監管的目標市場證據體系。差距不在於測試結果本身，而在於市場架構：透過 ONAC 路徑認證、在地進口商責任、UN 38.3 運輸與入境文件衔接。哥倫比亞不存在歐盟式的一般性電池法規、RoHS 類型的禁限用整體規則或歐盟意義上的戶外噪聲整體框架。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or if Colombian ONAC, SIC, MinEnergía, CRC/ANE guidance or China CCC/GB equivalence guidance changes.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag.
